response.overview: Directed by Noah Centineo, the music video for ARTY's "Save Me Tonight" follows a high school student (Lily Collins) who struggles with bullying and social isolation. With the help of a new friend (Centineo) and a group of outsiders, they orchestrate a lighthearted prank to turn the tables on their tormentors, celebrating the power of friendship and belonging.
response.title: ARTY: Save Me Tonight
